title: Diaphananthe rohrii
taxonomy: Diaphananthe rohrii is classified as a species of orchid. It belongs to the genus Diaphananthe and the family Orchidaceae. The genus Diaphananthe is part of the subtribe Spiranthinae within the orchid family. This classification reflects the plant's unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other orchids.
